name: workflow
description: Complete feature development workflow with scope-based routing: research (deep investigation), brainstorm (problem framing with scope classifier), discovery (domain-aware requirements for complex features), prd (tiered product requirements), technical-design (C4-based architecture with ASCII diagrams), plan (implementation plans with BRIEF/STANDARD modes), beads (intent-based tasks with FR traceability), execute (sub-agent implementation with upstream verification), review (parallel agent code review with PRD compliance), compound (structured learning capture). Requires br (beads-rust) CLI for task management.
